bead.title: FEAT-008 P5a: US-082g beads sort + filter + URL state
bead.description: Extend beads/+page.svelte with sort toggle + filter chips. Sort is a BUTTON named /sort by priority/i that toggles order (not a generic <select>). Filter chips for status, priority, labels (plural). Chips use aria-pressed bound to URL param. data-testid=bead-row on each row; data-priority is NUMERIC 0-4 (render 'P0'-'P4' as display text but attribute is numeric). Default sort = priority asc. URL params read on mount via $page.url; written on change via goto with replaceState: true. Accept BOTH 'label' and 'labels' on read (test uses /label=ui/ regex that matches either).
bead.acceptance: US-082g.a-e green (requires test-fixture fix bead ddx-85dc2ab8 to be closed first).
